title: helichrysum coursii
intro: Helichrysum coursii, also known as the yellow fever plant or wild garlic, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of helichrysum coursii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections. Helichrysum coursii is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
